question: What was the total revenue for Q3 2024?
answer: The total revenue for Q3 2024 was $4.2 billion, a 12% increase year-over-year.
contexts: Q3 2024 financial results: Total revenue reached $4.2 billion, representing a 12% increase compared to Q3 2023 revenue of $3.75 billion.
Revenue breakdown by segment: Product revenue $2.8B, Service revenue $1.4B.
ground_truth: Total revenue for Q3 2024 was $4.2 billion, up 12% year-over-year.

question: Which flight routes had the highest on-time performance last month?
answer: Routes from Chicago to Denver and New York to Boston had the highest on-time performance at 94% and 92% respectively.
contexts: Monthly on-time performance report: ORD-DEN route achieved 94% on-time arrivals. BOS-JFK route achieved 92% on-time arrivals.
Average system-wide on-time performance was 81% for the same period.
ground_truth: ORD-DEN and BOS-JFK routes had the highest on-time performance at 94% and 92%.

question: What is the refund policy for cancelled flights?
answer: Passengers receive a full refund within 7 business days for flights cancelled by the airline, or travel credit valid for 12 months.
contexts: Airline refund policy section 4.2: For airline-initiated cancellations, passengers are entitled to a full cash refund within 7 business days or a travel credit valid for 12 months from the date of cancellation.
Passengers must submit refund requests within 90 days of the original travel date.
ground_truth: Full refund within 7 business days or 12-month travel credit for airline-cancelled flights.

question: How many passengers were served in the last quarter?
answer: The airline served 18.3 million passengers in the last quarter, a 7% increase from the previous quarter.
contexts: Passenger traffic report Q4: Total passengers carried: 18.3 million. This represents a 7% quarter-over-quarter increase.
Load factor averaged 84% across all routes during this period.
ground_truth: 18.3 million passengers were served last quarter, up 7% quarter-over-quarter.

question: What are the baggage fee charges for extra luggage?
answer: The first checked bag is free for elite members. Additional bags cost $35 for the second bag and $75 for each subsequent bag.
contexts: Baggage policy: Elite members receive one free checked bag. Standard fare passengers pay $30 for the first checked bag.
Additional baggage fees: Second bag $35, third bag and beyond $75 per bag. Overweight bags (over 50 lbs) incur an additional $100 fee.
ground_truth: Second checked bag costs $35, third and beyond cost $75 each. Elite members get one free bag.
